message:
fix(security): enforce fail-closed semantics at temporal boundary conditions

Concurrent agent hardened all time-based gatekeeping comparisons from > to >=
(or < to <=), ensuring operations fail safely at exact boundary instants rather
than allowing a single-instant window where expired/exceeded state is treated
as valid:

- connector/fencing.rs: lease expiry rejects writes at exact expiration instant
  + test lease_expired_at_exact_boundary_is_rejected
- connector/health_gate.rs: empty required checks now fail gate (was passing)
  + tests empty_checks_fails_closed, all_optional_checks_fails_closed
- remote/idempotency_store.rs: entry expires AT TTL boundary not after
  + test entry_expired_at_exact_ttl_boundary
- runtime/crash_loop_detector.rs: cooldown remains active through exact boundary
  + test cooldown_active_at_exact_boundary
- security/staking_governance.rs: appeals fail if submitted at exact deadline
  + test test_appeal_expired_at_exact_deadline
- security/trust_complexity.rs: degraded mode expires AT max duration boundary
  + test degraded_mode_expired_at_exact_boundary
- supply_chain/provenance.rs: links stale AT both age and expiry boundaries
  + tests link_stale_at_exact_expiry_boundary, link_stale_at_exact_age_boundary
- policy/perf_budget_guard.rs: exact p95 budget boundary now rejects measurement
  + test renamed to test_exactly_at_p95_budget_fails_closed

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
